transparency_item: Identify prediction-like workflow and intended target
manuscript_or_package_response: Addressed in title/abstract as full-score rule approximation and triage workflow, not diagnosis.

transparency_item: Explain clinical/service context and intended use
manuscript_or_package_response: Framed as service-capacity triage for an existing SCL-90 total-score rule.
Public Mendeley Data V1, DOI and license reported; raw item wording not redistributed.
Full-length SCL-90 total >=160; same item pool limitation explicitly stated.
S1-S90 numeric items; fixed archived 15-item operational example and comparators.
Metadata-supported mapped Hunan/Shandong location-code split plus reverse and CV checks.
Logistic models, ranking approaches, tree-based sensitivity, and raw-sum workflow documented in code.
ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, Brier/calibration, top-k capacity, bootstrap CIs, and nested checks.
Gender-code/location/quality-flag diagnostics reported without overinterpreting code meanings.
Deployment card specifies human review, response-quality safeguard, calibration, and crisis override requirements.

transparency_item: Provide code, environment, and reproducibility route
manuscript_or_package_response: S1 Code includes requirements, environment report, smoke tests, quick route, and full route.
